results.title: Just: The end of Nebraska softball's season stings — its 'incredible story' has lasting impact
results.description: Nebraska softball's season ended with a sting, short of a national title, writes Amie Just, but its 'incredible story' of service and love will live on.

results.title: KOH and the Lagos challenge?
results.description: By Louis Odion First, we need to “set forth at dawn” (apologies Wole Soyinka, GCON) onto any of the arterial road abutting the main Lekki highway; or be at a typical crossroads in any of the derelict suburbs between closing hour and sunset to feel the tidal current — that sheer apocalyptic wave — of an [...] The post KOH and the Lagos challenge? appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: The Japanese Towel Roll Is Here to Fix Your Posture
results.description: The latest wellness technique that promises to strengthen the core and fix horrible posture has people across the country swapping their foam rollers and quickly adopting a stretching exercise that seems to be softer and gentler on the body: Meet the Japanese Towel Roll method. As Melissa Leber, MD, FACEP, associate professor of orthopedics and [...] The post The Japanese Towel Roll Is Here to Fix Your Posture appeared first on NYT News Today .

results.title: "Rusagro" transferred to the management of Rosselkhozbank's structure after the controlling stake was transferred to the state
results.description: PJSC "Rusagro Group" has been transferred to the management of LLC "RSHB-Finance", a structure of Rosselkhozbank. The corresponding entry was made in the Unified State Register of Legal Entities on May 28, 2026.

results.title: Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion in 26 years
results.description: Israeli army captures Beaufort Castle in Lebanon, marking its deepest incursion in 26 years amid escalating conflict with Hezbollah.

results.title: Migration Boom, Latino Backlash Jolts Texas Senate Race

results.title: Iran reopens 50 access points at 18 underground missile facilities after the ceasefire period began — satellite images show
results.description: Satellite imagery shows earthmovers restoring access to sites hit by US-Israeli strikes

results.title: Taxpayers to pay $135 million more for worse safety under aviation firefighting privatisation plan
results.description: The United Firefighters Union of Australia Aviation Branch has called on the Federal Government to stop Airservices Australia’s aviation firefighting privatisation plan, warning that it will cost taxpayers an extra $135 million for a worse safety outcome. The plan includes engaging a sovereign wealth fund as a ‘strategic partner’ to purchase aviation firefighting assets, ... Continued
